hyperedges.label: Sanity Studio + Blog Routes + Post Schema Integration
Hero Visual Layer Stack (Background + Overlay + Content)

nodes.label: ISR Revalidation (60s interval)
nodes.rationale: Posts revalidate every 60 seconds via Next.js ISR, balancing content freshness with performance without requiring a full redeploy.

nodes.label: Hero Section Layout — Bottom-left Anchor
nodes.rationale: Full-bleed AVIF background with dark gradient overlay chosen for visual impact; content anchored bottom-left for a modern editorial feel. CTA buttons removed to reduce cognitive load and surface only brand identity.

nodes.label: Dark Gradient Overlay (theme-invariant)
nodes.rationale: Overlay is always dark regardless of data-theme so text legibility on the photographic background is guaranteed in both light and dark modes.

nodes.label: Dark Logo Color Palette (Near-Black + Steel Blue)
nodes.norm_label: dark logo color palette (near-black + steel blue)

nodes.label: Black and White Portrait Photography Style
nodes.norm_label: black and white portrait photography style

links.note: Portrait appears to be a professional headshot intended for use on the SerenEdge website as founder imagery
The photo is a monochrome/black-and-white studio-style portrait with neutral background, conveying a professional and artistic aesthetic
